# [PE_030](../PE_030.java)

The digit powers are precomputed and all digit power sums are recursively generated and checked.

Some results in the form  
`<p> <time in ms>: <digit p-th powers>`
<details>
<summary>Results up to p = 17</summary>

```
2  1 ms: []
3  0 ms: [153, 371, 370, 407]
4  1 ms: [1634, 8208, 9474]
5  0 ms: [4151, 4150, 194979, 92727, 93084, 54748]
6  0 ms: [548834]
7  0 ms: [1741725, 4210818, 9926315, 14459929, 9800817]
8  1 ms: [24678051, 24678050, 88593477]
9  1 ms: [146511208, 912985153, 472335975, 534494836]
10 2 ms: [4679307774]
11 4 ms: [32164049651, 94204591914, 32164049650, 82693916578, 40028394225, 42678290603, 44708635679, 49388550606]
12 7 ms: []
13 14 ms: [564240140138]
14 24 ms: [28116440335967]
15 41 ms: []
16 66 ms: [4338281769391371, 4338281769391370]
17 109 ms: [233411150132317, 21897142587612075, 35641594208964132, 35875699062250035]
```
</details>
